caption: A crowd of men gathers outdoors, many wearing casual attire such as jackets and white shirts; one man is notably wearing a black "GAP" sweatshirt. The scene is overlaid with a red and yellow news graphic containing various text elements. The top banner reads "कांग्रेस छटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है". Smaller text boxes on the sides list names including "डिप्टी CM", "सभरात चौधरी", "विजय सिन्हा", "मंत्री", "विजेन्द्र यादव", and "श्रवण कुमार". A yellow banner at the bottom states "HAM के संतोष कुमार सुमन मंत्री बने", which is partially cut off in the final frame. A "MAHAREDIT" logo is visible near the timestamp "10:08 PM". Across the sequence, the camera remains mostly static, capturing the men interacting and talking in a densely packed group, with slight movements of the people as they shift positions and converse.
